description: Agent shows only final results to user — hiding intermediate execution steps from terminal.

rules.principle: The user receives only the final answer. All intermediate operations go to wiki/log.md via append — user never sees them.
prohibited_output: Bash stdout/stderr (grep output, script results, file listings)
Intermediate search data (web_search snippets before final synthesis)
allowed_output: Created files (wiki pages with frontmatter and content)
Errors + resolved action ([!] Contradiction resolved: 7.x LTS uses PHP 8.2)

verbose_mode.trigger: "verbose", "debug mode" —— shows grep/find results but only for one turn.
verbose_mode.reset: After verbose answer agent resets to silent. Explicit reset triggers: quiet, silent, less.
